scope: Recovery probe after R34 cap: 4 consumer-set-rich dropped docs (35, 22, 31, 60), lean config, first live test of the adversarial verifier.
outcome: CLEAN - 0 dropped, window recovered, verifier worked

cap_probe.note: Window fully recovered after the R34 2h wait. Lean doc-centric+verify at 4 docs = ample headroom. Safe to continue.

verifier_first_run.validated_by_hand: YES. pm_land_conservation consumer set re-derived independently: declared M22; read by M13(13_tc presolve), M29(cropland eqs), M31(past presolve), M32(forestry presolve), M35(natveg eqs+presolve); ZERO M10 direct hits -> matches verifier exactly (M10 phantom confirmed, M29/M13 omissions confirmed).
verifier_first_run.key_catch: module_35 B2 CORRECTED: auditor's fix had the right module (M73->M32) but mislabeled the equation; verifier corrected it to q32_ndc_aff_limit (32_forestry/dynamic_may24/equations.gms:80). The fixer applied the corrected_set.
verifier_first_run.verdict: Verifier VALIDATED. It scales the by-hand consumer-set check (R33-style) and caught an auditor mislabel a human spot-check of only Criticals might have missed. Going forward: rely on it for consumer-set findings; periodic meta-checks only.

per_doc.label: module_35
per_doc.key: CRITICAL (validated): age-class range truncated to ac150 vs actual ac0..ac300+acx = 62 elem (core/sets.gms:269-275; R16-anchor class). Major: vm_natforest_reduction consumer M73->M32 (verifier-CORRECTED eq name to q32_ndc_aff_limit); phantom pm_land_start input. Both checker leads (M52, M22) REFUTED by audit.

per_doc.label: module_22
per_doc.key: 2 CRITICAL consumer-set (verifier-UPHELD + hand-validated): M10 falsely 'primary' direct consumer of pm_land_conservation (transitive only; MANDATE17/R20 anchor); M29+M13 omitted (real set M13,M29,M31,M32,M35). Major: vm_treecover producer M32->M29; fm_land_iso M09->M10. Cross-lead (M22 reads vm_land_other/v35_secdforest) REFUTED.

per_doc.label: module_31
per_doc.key: Major: static realization mislabeled 'deprecated' (not_used.txt is a 26-realization convention file, not deprecation); 'Provides To M22' is a reversed dep (M22->M31 only, verifier-upheld). Minor: stockType label; vm_carbon_stock Source M52->M56 (G2).

per_doc.label: module_60
per_doc.key: Major: scaling.gms vm_bioenergy_utility.scale = 1e2 at line 9 (doc cited line 8 = different var, claimed 10e4/10^5). Minor: presolve fix-block product-set label; '90+' scenarios vs verified 88. CHECKER LEAD (vm_dem_bioen 'GJ') REFUTED - doc correct (tDM).

anchors: none (G1-G4 all exercised earlier this session; G4 drift noted in R34)
key_learnings: Adversarial verifier validated on first live run: independent consumer-set re-derivation matched a by-hand check exactly, and it CORRECTED an auditor equation-name mislabel (module_35 B2). The lean doc-centric+verify config (~13 agents/4 docs) is cap-safe and high-value -> the right sweep config.
vm_dem_bioen 'GJ' checker advisory REFUTED (doc correctly says tDM) - another correctly-refuted fed lead; the in-code declarations.gms:14 typo 'GHJ' is a CODE defect, not a doc defect.
